= Sicilian Defense, Dragon, Main Line =
{{Chess Opening Theory/Position|Sicilian Defense, Dragon, Main Line||rd||bd|qd||rd|kd||pd|pd|||pd|pd|bd|pd|||nd|pd||nd|pd||||||||||||bl|nl|pl||||||nl||bl|pl|||pl|pl|pl|ql|||pl|pl|rl||||kl|||rl|parent=[[Chess/Sicilian Dragon|Sicilian Dragon]]}}Bc4 develops the bishop to a good square, pinning the f7 pawn and aiming at the Black king and kingside to attack. On the next move White will castle queenside and a fierce attack is on!
